---
name: Epic
about: Track a larger goal that groups multiple tasks or follow-up issues.
title: '[Epic] '
labels: 'enhancement, priority:medium'
assignees: ''
---

Type: Planning

## Background

Explain why this epic is needed.

Examples:

- Manage one larger theme under a single parent issue
- Create a clear entry point for tracking progress
- Define the goal and boundaries for related child tasks

## Target

- Who or what area this epic affects

## In Scope

- Deliverables and topics covered by this epic

## Out of Scope

- Items that should be handled in another issue or epic

## Done Criteria

- [ ] The epic is broken down into the required child tasks
- [ ] The goal of the epic can be explained in one sentence
- [ ] The completion condition is clearly defined

## Risks or Open Questions

- Open questions, dependencies, or concerns

## Child Issues

- [ ] #issue-number Child task name

## Current Phase

- User value / High-level design / Detailed design / Implementation / Validation / Operations and improvements

## Next Action

- The first child task or next concrete step

## Label Notes

- Default: `enhancement`, `priority:medium`
- Add one area label if clear: `area:backend`, `area:frontend`, or `area:infra`
- Use `documentation` if the work is mainly documentation
- Use `help wanted` if extra support is needed
